issue.title: Google Play: com.skt.tmap.ku

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.skt.tmap.ku](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Dcom.skt.tmap.ku) ### Comment > > 안녕하세요. > 최근 TMAP 사용 중 검색 화면에서 간헐적으로 서비스 오류가 발생하고 있습니다. > > 증상은 다음과 같습니다. > > 검색창(장소/주소 검색) 진입 시 > “일시적으로 서비스를 이용할 수 없습니다. 잠시 후 다시 접속해 주세요.” > 메시지가 출력되며 검색 기능이 동작하지 않음 > > 와이파이, 데이터 네트워크 환경에서 반복적으로 발생 > > 광고 차단 앱(AdGuard) 사용 중 발생 > > AdGuard 필터 또는 DNS 차단과 관련된 충돌 가능성이 있어 보임 > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/efi5rodwvdsksg00s4c0cs408wc440051jvij59gf8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/qhpgtj7b6f44os4s8g44gowogggk8gci58yy0ib5m0.jpg?nc=1)

I'm waiting for your additional comments.
Critical bug.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://ergofount.com/ru/catalog/monitor-mounts-ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fergofount.com%2Fru%2Fcatalog%2Fmonitor-mounts-ru%2F) ### Comment > The website has been compromised and displays a fake Cloudflare/hCaptcha pop-up (ClickFix / Fake Captcha campaign). > > It tricks Windows users into executing malicious PowerShell code via system shortcuts. > Steps it asks the user to perform: > 1. issue.title: Fix #231357 www.naver.com

comment.body:
@ntnguyen1234 No optimization is needed. If the subdomains of `naver.com` have an `m.` prefix, they serve the mobile version. This domain is frequently visited by desktop users.

Because desktop users in Korea typically access the mobile page via links shared from mobile devices, and The NAVER doesn't offer a redirect to the desktop site.
